case_title: VICTOR GERMAN CAICERO-ROSAS VS. ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-03-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-14-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE, PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARTINA LAMELI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED MAR-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAICERO-ROSAS, VICTOR GERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (A. YAZBEK:AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAICERO-ROSAS, VICTOR GERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -SIGNED SERVED JAN-08-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAICERO-ROSAS, VICTOR GERMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANDRE'S FOREIGN CAR SERVICES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTRE, NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2014 - JUDGMENT.
